title: QuestionTrace — Project Scope
summary: Locked in-scope/out-of-scope contract for the QuestionTrace research app, with framing rules and research-instrument success criteria deferring to research_system_design.md as authority.
scope: post detail AI wrapper (hook, summary, concept tags, suggested questions)
feed orchestration strategies (Continue, Deepen, Contrast, Bridge, Echo)
study infrastructure (onboarding, condition assignment, logging, export, oral-test support)
out-of-scope exclusions (chat, flashcards, graph UI, gamification, podcast, social, live search, analytics dashboards)
notes: No ADR frontmatter/status in file; type ADR and locked status come from the authoritative manifest declaration and orchestrator directive that scope boundaries are locked decisions. Content is a scope contract (in/out lists, framing rules, success criteria) rather than a single Context/Decision/Consequences record.
